'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 7''' was the seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 13]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]]. It also featured original artwork by [[Carl Lyons]] and [[Tig Sutton]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Deploying the Death Star]] {{C|DEA 1-2}}
**<small>With Princess Leia a prisoner, the Death Star was readied for action.</small>
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] {{C|LEI 3-8}}
**<small>Royal Princess of Alderaan and Senator who became a key Rebel leader.</small>
*[[Watto/Legends|Watto]] {{C|WAT 1-4}}
**<small>The Toydarian junk dealer who once owned Anakin Skywalker.</small>
*[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] Overview {{C|PLA 1-6}}
**<small>Systems and planets close to the Galactic Core and the seat of government.</small>
*[[B'omarr brain walkerB'omarr Brain Walker]] {{C|BOM 1-2}}
**<small>Bio-mechanical monks that inhabit Jabba the Hutt's palace.</small>
*[[Sabacc/Legends|Sabacc]] {{C|SAB 1-2}}
**<small>The captivating game of chance, which won Han Solo the ''Millennium Falcon''.</small>
*[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] {{C|TIE 1-2}}
**<small>High-performance Imperial starfighter used in countless battles and skirmishes.</small>

==Development==
The Sabacc article includes original artwork depicting [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] by [[Carl Lyons]] on SAB 1, while the 
second page of the article includes orriginal art work depicting a set of four Sabacc cards by [[Tig Sutton]].<ref name="Issue" />
